The '''Kaelta system''', also known as '''Toola system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Nilgaard sector/Legends|Nilgaard sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Toola/Legends|Toola]]. Its primary was [[Kaelta]].
